facts.shortSummary: In the north tower, the party shares food with Vola and learns how Agata Dustmother's servants captured her while waiting for a ritual at Raven's Hold to succeed.
facts.longSummary: Holed up in the north tower at dusk, the party gets its first real conversation with Vola Forena after rescuing her from captivity. Vola explains that she came to Raven's Hold hunting Drankorian relics, was seized by an orc and two jackalweres serving Agata Dustmother, and was told she would be taken away once an important ritual here was complete. Her account ties the fortress, the captive animals, and the growing nightmares into the same threat.

location.context: the north tower chamber overlooking the inner courtyard
location.notes: The party remains in the tower while debriefing Vola after her rescue.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: She recounts her capture and what her captors told her about the ritual.

npcs.name: Agata Dustmother
npcs.notes: Vola says the orc and jackalweres serve her and meant to take Vola to her.

organizations.name: Society of the Open Scroll
organizations.notes: Vola identifies herself with the Society while explaining why she came to the fortress.

facts.shortSummary: The party argues over rest versus urgency, weighs Vola's warning, and settles on sending an invisible scout team into the keep.
facts.longSummary: Still in the tower, the group turns Vola's report into a plan. They debate whether they dare sleep, whether the ritual may be tied to the water and the penned animals, and whether surprise is worth more than caution. By the end of the discussion, they choose a stealth approach: Wellby under invisibility with Kenzo nearby, while the others take what recovery they can.

location.context: the north tower and its view over the keep and inner courtyard
location.notes: The beat stays in the tower while the party plans its next move.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: She keeps warning that the place is dangerous and that she needs sleep.

facts.shortSummary: Kenzo and Wellby slip through the misty courtyard, uncover a ruined chapel stuffed with animal carcasses, and spot an undead gnoll and a waiting demon inside the keep.
facts.longSummary: Under cover of darkness and invisibility, Kenzo and Wellby cross the steaming inner courtyard to inspect the keep firsthand. They find the shattered chapel of Aagir blocked with bones and rotting animal bodies, then glimpse an undead gnoll and a horned demon pacing inside the main hall amid bonfires, skulls, and unnatural heat. After quietly making the circuit, they return to the tower with proof that the ritual is real and already far advanced.

location.context: the inner courtyard and first-floor exterior of the keep
location.notes: The scout circles the keep, peering in through broken windows before retreating.

npcs.name: Oduk
npcs.context: goat-like festering demon in the keep
npcs.notes: The scout confirms a demon is pacing the great hall near the ritual fires.

npcs.name: undead gnoll
npcs.notes: Kenzo quietly kills one while scouting, confirming that undead gnolls guard the keep.

organizations.name: Five Siblings
organizations.notes: The ruined chapel is identified as a desecrated chapel of Aagir.

facts.shortSummary: Back in the tower, the group pieces together the demon's likely role in making gnolls and decides they cannot afford to wait until morning before striking.
facts.longSummary: The scout report triggers a longer tactical debate. Seeker connects the ritual to demonic lore about consuming corrupted flesh, Kenzo senses that the demon is tethered to another plane, and the group weighs whether delay would let the process finish or spread. They finally commit to attacking that night, cross the courtyard in two prongs, and set up the ambush at the keep entrance.

location.context: the north tower and then the keep entrance across the inner courtyard
location.notes: The beat moves from planning in the tower to the final stealthy approach.

npcs.name: Oduk
npcs.context: the demon targeted for the ambush
npcs.notes: The party decides the demon is too dangerous to leave in place overnight.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: Despite exhaustion, she joins the assault rather than remain behind.

facts.shortSummary: The ambush begins well, but the fight quickly turns desperate as Oduk closes with the front line and the undead gnolls pin down the party.
facts.longSummary: The party opens with surprise attacks from the doorway and shadows, trying to bring Oduk down before it can use the ritual ground to its advantage. The demon proves tougher than expected, staring into minds, hissing curses, and lashing out with claws and a poisoned tail while undead gnolls press in around it. What began as a clean ambush turns into a close, chaotic melee in the keep entrance.

location.context: the keep's great hall entrance beside the ruined chapel
location.notes: The opening phase of the battle is fought around the doorway, bonfires, and body-strewn hall.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: She joins the fight with conjured blades despite her exhaustion.

npcs.name: Oduk
npcs.notes: It meets the ambush head-on and drives the battle into close quarters.

npcs.name: undead gnolls
npcs.notes: Three undead gnolls support the demon and swarm the party.

mainEnemies.name: Oduk
mainEnemies.notes: The festering demon at the center of the ritual.

mainEnemies.name: undead gnolls
mainEnemies.notes: Rotting gnoll servitors fighting alongside Oduk.

combat.notes: The fight opens from surprise, but the demon quickly forces the party into a dangerous melee.

facts.shortSummary: Oduk's poison nearly drops Delwath and Kenzo, but the party rallies, destroys the demon, and finishes the last undead gnoll.
facts.longSummary: The second half of the battle becomes a struggle to survive Oduk's poison and keep people standing long enough to finish it. Delwath goes down under the demon's tail and Seeker has to pull him back with healing and an elixir while Kenzo fights on through rotting flesh and disadvantage. Vola's conjured dagger and Kenzo's final strike break Oduk's form, after which Riswynn crushes the remaining gnoll and the ritual hall finally falls quiet.

location.context: inside the keep's great hall and threshold
location.notes: The battle remains in the same hall until the demon is destroyed.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: Her conjured blade helps wear the demon down at a key moment.

npcs.name: Oduk
npcs.notes: Kenzo breaks one horn and the demon vanishes before the last gnoll is finished.

npcs.name: undead gnolls
npcs.context: last defenders of the ritual hall
npcs.notes: The final gnoll falls only after the demon is already gone.

items.name: elixir of health
items.notes: Seeker uses one to clear Delwath's poison during the fight.

mainEnemies.name: Oduk
mainEnemies.notes: Destroyed in the middle of the melee.

mainEnemies.name: undead gnolls
mainEnemies.notes: The last one is cleaned up after Oduk falls.

combat.notes: The fight ends with Oduk destroyed, the last gnoll slain, and the party badly wounded but still in control of the keep.

facts.shortSummary: After the battle, the party searches the keep, banks the ritual fires, finds more hobgoblin papers, and confirms there is no obvious deeper chamber below.
facts.longSummary: With Oduk gone, the group studies the ruined chapel and great hall, trying to understand what the demon had been doing with the animal carcasses and skull-lined fires. They extinguish the ritual flames, search the upper floors, and recover another bundle of old papers in the same hobgoblin hand as earlier finds, but they uncover no clear hidden lair or basement. Kenzo remains afflicted while the others conclude that rest in the tower is the safest option left.

location.context: the keep's chapel, great hall, and upper rooms
location.notes: The beat covers the immediate search of the cleared keep after the fight.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: She is nearly spent and mostly rests while the others investigate.

items.name: hobgoblin papers
items.notes: The party finds another satchel of old pages that look like troop or unit records in a hobgoblin language.

facts.shortSummary: The party withdraws to the tower, endures corrupted dreams and incomplete healing, and wakes at dawn with a longer list of questions and remaining threats.
facts.longSummary: Back in the north tower, the party posts a watch and tries to salvage the night while gnolls briefly investigate the shut gate below and move on. The rest is uneven: some sleepers wake shaken, while Kenzo, Delwath, and Seeker lose hit points or gain exhaustion from vivid nightmares of animals becoming gnolls. At dawn they regroup, compare what they learned, and decide the next day must deal with the remaining gnolls, the penned animals, the river, and the larger mystery behind Agata's operation.

location.context: the north tower refuge above the inner courtyard
location.notes: The beat starts with the retreat back to the tower and ends with the dawn planning conversation there.

npcs.name: Vola Forena
npcs.notes: She finally gets real sleep, though her rest is still troubled by vague dreams.

npcs.name: remaining gnolls
npcs.context: guards or handlers outside the gate
npcs.notes: A small group checks the shut gate during the night, confirming the threat outside is not gone.

npcs.name: Agata Dustmother
npcs.notes: The dawn discussion turns back to her motives and the wider plan at Raven's Hold.
